topics.title: In The City (Bravo) Premieres May 19 — Kyle & Amanda's Divorce On Camera
topics.hook: Bravo's Summer House spinoff drops two days from now. Kyle and Amanda are literally navigating divorce, shared businesses, and shared friend groups in real time on television.
topics.summary: In The City premieres May 19 starring Amanda Batula, Kyle Cooke, and Lindsay Hubbard. The show documents the end of Kyle and Amanda's marriage, their intertwined NYC lives, and the Amanda-West-Ciara love triangle fallout. New scenes were filmed after Amanda confirmed her relationship with West Wilson.
topics.relevance: Pop culture hook — Kyle and Amanda's uncoupling under cameras accidentally illustrates the LLMA point: what happens when you don't design your exit the same way you design your life.

topics.title: Platonic Co-Parenting Is Now a Mainstream Trend — Apps Are Exploding
topics.hook: People are actively choosing their best friends as co-parents. Dedicated apps have gone from 30K to 100K+ users. The Washington Stand is panicking. LLMA should be talking.
topics.summary: Platonic co-parenting — two people choosing to raise a child together without a romantic relationship — has gone from fringe to mainstream. Modamily hit 100K registered users (from 30K), LetsBeParents grew from 1,200 to 10,000 monthly users. LGBTQ+ community is a driver but heterosexual singles are a growing segment. Counseling emphasized as key. Backlash from conservative press is already loud, which means the conversation is happening at scale.
topics.relevance: Direct LLMA topic — intentional partnership applied to the biggest decision possible: parenthood. Fresh angle, not covered in previous drops.

topics.title: Lavender Marriage TikTok Trend Continues — Gen Z Applying for Their Gay Best Friend
topics.hook: The 3.6M view TikTok is still circulating. New creators are making 'interview-style' videos asking gay men if they'd consider it.
topics.summary: The lavender marriage discourse continues at high volume on TikTok, now with new interview-style and 'application' formats. Ongoing elevated buzz but LLMA has now covered this topic twice (May 6, May 14). Best as supporting reference only.
topics.relevance: Ongoing — covered twice already. Use as supporting reference, not primary angle.
